title: Umami Light Slovakian Baby Pak Koi Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful monsoon-inspired dish featuring tender baby pak koi, gently stir-fried with umami-rich ingredients.
instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add whisked garlic and ginger. Sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Lower the heat slightly and add scallions, stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Gently incorporate diced baby pak koi into the pan, cooking for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until cooked through but still tender.
Pour in sukhovatka (salted fermented husk), shrimp paste, and fish stock. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Simmer gently for an additional 2-3 minutes ensuring flavors meld together without boiling over too quickly.
Season with pepper corn powder if needed, taste test and adjust seasoning as required.
Serve immediately while the dish is still warm.
